file_insights.purpose: launchd service definition template for macOS filesystem-triggered merge-gate daemon
key_elements: Resource limits: file descriptor caps (hard=1024, soft=512)

patterns_discovered.description: XML-based macOS service definition with WatchPaths filesystem trigger
elements: Label key for unique service identification
WatchPaths array for directory monitoring (replaces polling)

patterns_discovered.description: WatchPaths monitoring pattern replaces polling dispatcher

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple REPLACE_WITH_* tokens must be substituted before launchctl load
gotchas_discovered.impact: Service will not function correctly with unresolved placeholders

gotchas_discovered.description: Template includes examples for team-arch/, team-cli/ etc. but they are commented
gotchas_discovered.impact: Multi-team setups require manual uncommentation and path adjustment

gotchas_discovered.description: RunAtLoad=true with KeepAlive=false implies one-shot execution per WatchPaths trigger
gotchas_discovered.impact: Service starts on login but doesn't auto-restart on crash (expected behavior for event-driven merge-gate)

gotchas_discovered.description: StandardOutPath and StandardErrorPath use /tmp/ which are cleaned on reboot
gotchas_discovered.impact: Logs disappear on system restart; may need rotation or persistent log location

approach_details.execution: Template created with complete launchd plist structure
approach_details.alignment: Aligns with bop VM-first architecture and MICROCLAW dispatcher design (WatchPaths replaces polling)
approach_details.completeness: Includes all required launchd keys plus optional resource limits and logging

recommendations.details: Script should substitute REPLACE_WITH_REPO_ROOT and REPLACE_WITH_HOME, verify paths exist, then launchctl load
Document that /usr/local/bin/bop must exist and be executable by launchd session
Consider logging to ~/.bop/logs/ or /var/log/bop/ instead of /tmp/ to survive reboots
Provide clear example of uncommented WatchPaths entries for team-specific directories
Document launchctl list sh.bop.merge-gate and log inspection troubleshooting steps
